title: 24-HOUR CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: CENTER FOR HOPE AND SAFETY 24-HOUR CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis line that includes safety planning. 605 Center Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic violence, sexual abuse, human trafficking, and/or stalking, regardless of gender identity or sexual orientation Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 399-7722 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 399-7722 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located one block from the downtown bus mall. Parking is available in the lot at the front of the building along Center Street. Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines Human Trafficking Hotlines Sexual Assault Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY SHELTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER FOR HOPE AND SAFETY
